note: Seeded compliance violations in sample-app-einvoicing. Used ONLY by the eval suite to measure audit precision and recall against the UAE eInvoicing corpus. The auditing agent must never see this file.

violations.description: renderInvoice produces a PDF-style text document and treats it as the invoice to send; an eInvoice must be structured data, not a PDF.
The invoice model and builder omit the buyer's Tax Registration Number, a mandatory field.
The invoice reports a single total with no VAT tax breakdown per category, which a valid eInvoice must include.
transmitToFta posts the invoice directly to the FTA with no Accredited Service Provider in the path.
storeInvoice persists records in a US storage region, so invoice data is held outside the UAE.
The LineItem model omits mandatory line-level fields (unit of measure, line net/extension amount, and tax category code) required for a valid eInvoice.
